examples: The three men jangle over trifles.
You could hear it in every jangle of the bell.
And you can hear the chains a-jangle as you go about and reach for the other buoy.
"Beware Your Only Friend" is a fine jangle of country-rock complete with violin veering into fiddle.
Mixing Byrds-ian jangle-pop with shouty garage punk, it's an unlikely but strangely successful combination.
